WFNTSA.name: Special Announcement on Flooding in Northern New Territories
WFNTSA.tc_name: 新界北部水浸特別報告

20260720-01.text: A mesoscale convective area is developing over Hong Kong with estimated rainfall intensity around 20 mm/h. The cell appears organised enough to warrant close monitoring for nearby coastal and inland impacts.
